# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for sqs policy too permissive and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      QueueName: !Sub "my-sqs-queue-${AWS::Region}"

  SNS Topic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "my-sns-topic-${AWS::Region}"

  SQSPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt "SQSQueue.Arn"
          -
            Sid: AllowReceive
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:GetMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt "SQSQueue.Arn"

  SNSPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref SNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt "SNSTopic.Arn"

Outputs:
  SQSQueueArn:
    Value: !GetAtt "SQSQueue.Arn"
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue

  SNSTopicArn:
    Value: !GetAtt "SNSTopic.Arn"
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
